content.rendered:
How It Started

Stilch is a new online platform entering the highly competitive sports betting space. The founder came to us with a bold idea and a blank slate — no website, no branding, just a vision.

He wanted a site that didn’t just look sleek but converted. Fast load times, strong mobile performance, and built-in credibility were non-negotiables. That’s exactly what our Web Department set out to build.

Project Overview

Stilch needed a professional, high-performance site that could:

  • Educate users about how their platform works
  • Build trust with clear language and policy pages
  • Collect user interest ahead of full product launch
  • Maintain legal and regulatory clarity in layout and copy

We focused on creating a design that would be easy to navigate, sharp on mobile, and optimized for future growth through SEO and email opt-ins.

What We Did

  • Designed a custom WordPress site using Elementor for easy edits and flexible scaling
  • Developed page sections to clearly explain Stilch’s betting platform, bonuses, and mission
  • Added high-impact CTAs for early access, lead capture, and legal disclaimers
  • Integrated privacy policy, terms, and regulatory details in a clean, accessible format
  • Launched full on-page SEO setup to help Stilch start ranking for betting-related terms
  • Included schema markup and alt text for all assets to support indexability
  • Built a scalable backend so the platform could grow alongside marketing efforts

Live Preview Screenshot

The screenshot shown on our Case Studies page features the initial desktop version, with bold green branding, CTA buttons, and a modular layout that explains how Stilch works at a glance.

Real Improvements

  • Entire website built and launched in just 14 days
  • Mobile performance optimized from day one
  • Fully prepared for future integrations like Stripe, email flows, and analytics
  • Strong baseline SEO health score and keyword foundations
  • Legal-ready footer structure with disclaimers and country visibility settings

Next Steps

Now that the site is live, we’re helping Stilch prepare for Phase 2: custom lead tracking, payment gateway integration, and blog-based traffic building. We’ve also advised them on Google Ads policies and what to avoid in the sports betting ad space.

Ready to Launch Something Bold?

This is a perfect example of how we help founders go from “idea” to full digital presence, fast.
Want a site built to convert? Book a free strategy call →

excerpt.rendered: We helped Stilch launch a clean, conversion-ready website designed for user trust, fast performance, and future growth in the competitive sports betting space.
